book_claims.claim: Listed as a source of omega-3 (0.25 g EPA/DHA per 75 g cooked)
book_claims.mechanism: Lean white fish with modest omega-3 content

supplementary_research.finding: Red snapper provides complete protein and moderate selenium; mercury levels acceptable at 2–3 servings per week; not a high omega-3 source
Even modest EPA/DHA from lean fish contributes to cardiovascular risk reduction; snapper appropriate as part of varied 2–3 fish servings per week

nutrient_highlights.bioavailability_notes: High-quality lean protein; all essential amino acids
Antioxidant; supports thyroid function; high bioavailability from fish
Moderate; contribute to weekly omega-3 target when combined with sardines or anchovies in the same week

synergies.description: Book recommends 2–3 fish servings/week; snapper as lean white fish complements high-omega-3 oily fish like sardines
Adds MUFA and improves absorption of fat-soluble vitamins; traditional Mediterranean preparation
Acid brightens the mild flavor and adds vitamin C to the meal
